66ED94194CD6F160BBF0F085193CA4AE: <empha>Close Portals</> by Ninja throwing <empha>Chaos Embers</> inside. (It's just like regular throwing, but more stylish, because you're a Ninja). Close enough and you'll summon an ICE Dragon! (They really love their Portals.) Zane left a note for you: To get an edge against this enemy, gear up with ELEMENTAL Defiance Charms and LIGHTNING Weapons!
0BF1FDEE4D760832CCF0D6A3A75CD61D: Kai the Master of ELEMENTAL FIRE, has returned to the Monastery of Spinjitzu! He looks pretty rough, but it seems like he made a fiery new friend...
B4105851469B7F463BB3E5A676906B8A: <empha>Upgrade your Ninjago Island Village to Level 3.</> Check the Villlage Square to see the resources you'll need to upgrade your new Village into a place that the Ninja can call home!
A8DF5A5C40DFF3174FD463815806451C: A New Route to New Roots
B05B7E724BC30B9AA67716963279824D: Asher said if you find extra FIRE Ink around Ninjago Island, she'd be glad to take it off your hands! She says she uses it shine her scales... but we all know she's been writing Oni fanfic at night. It's pretty good!
B508033C43BF988E0199DC97FFD76ACC: Asher wants you to <empha>Craft a FIRE Relic</> at a Ninja Workbench. You'll need <empha>a Ninja Betrayer Headband, FIRE Energy, an ELEMENTAL animal resource, and some Honed materials.</>

4B72315A49456DF85A88E6ADECFE3E03: It Takes a Village to Raise a Ninja
6D0CCB80427733AA425BE3A945B3CF09: Lloyd has an important (and cozy) mission for you! Head to the <empha>Monastery of Spinjitzu</> and <empha>talk to Lloyd</> about putting down roots!
C400D7EB462582B3DACFDE8B014E9DC0: Most folks just don't appreciate the artistry of repurposing a humble farming implement into a super sweet Ninja weapon. Now that you've crafted Cole's signature weapon, it's time to show him that he's got a fellow <empha>Scythe</> admirerer.
8DA8E85F452B0D2AC47D098B6A0B1E3C: Now you're ready to fight FIRE with FIRE! (Well, you'll probably have better luck fighting EARTH with FIRE, since that's EARTH'S ELEMENTAL weakness...) Anyways, Asher will be excited to hear you've crafted a Relic!
0359D0C14C97B3D8084F4185F0C27C3C: Powerful Oni are lurking in the Forest of Spirits. Be warned, these are 8 enemies, so gear up with higher Weapons and Charms!
741B291B481EFC12C3261BB32988774C: THAT BABY DRAGON WANTS TO BE FRIENDS WITH YOU! WHAT ARE YOU DOING STILL READING THIS?! GO TALK TO THEM!
749FB2024ADD3E858BD4AD99677F68AA: The Master of ELEMENTAL EARTH is at the Monastery of Spinjitzu and has new information on an enemy threatening Ninjago Island. He's also got the downlow on a signature weapon to bring in a harvest... of victory.
D3AE2D4849E21659730DCDB2D92042AC: The best way to show the Shatter Spawn we're not afraid is by making <emphasis>Ninjago Island</> our own! Get out there and <emphasis>start a Village</>! Fill it full of Sheep... or Villagers... or cannons... or Pizzas... whatever speaks to you!
36DF80F84B635A974A100486F7E89902: Use <empha>Ritual Oil</> on <empha>Bamboo, Kozustone, Steel, or Dragon Opal</> at a <empha>Ritual Altar</> to create <empha>Honed</> materials. Use them at a <empha>Ninja Workbench</> to craft a <empha>Scythe</> capable of fending off swarms of enemies in one stroke!
